+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "seaweedfs-2445-mount-fuse-mount-seems-not-writeable-through-macos-finder",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "seaweedfs: [mount] Fuse Mount seems not writeable through MacOS Finder",
+    "description": "[mount] Fuse Mount seems not writeable through MacOS Finder. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current seaweedfs deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your seaweedfs version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=seaweedfs\nhelm list -n seaweedfs 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working seaweedfs installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review seaweedfs configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant seaweedfs configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=seaweedfs\nkubectl get configmap -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=seaweedfs\n```\n## Bug description\nI use `weed mount` on my macOS Developer machine (exact environment description below)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [mount] Fuse Mount seems not writeable through MacOS Finder",
+        "description": "…der copy bug on arm64 macOS devices.\n\n# What problem are we solving?\nThis pull request fixes #2445\n\n# How are we solving the problem?\nMoved noapplexattr under an if statement the switches on runtime.GOARCH == \"amd64\"\n\n# How is the PR tested?\nCompiled and tested on macOS Sonoma 14.11 (arm64)\n\n#\n```yaml\nweed server -dir=\"./data\" --filer=true\nweed mount -filer=localhost:8888 -dir=mnt/SeaweedFS -allowOthers -volumeServerAccess=direct -nonempty -replication=000 -filer.path=/\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n seaweedfs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=seaweedfs\nkubectl get events -n seaweedfs --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[mount] Fuse Mount seems not writeable through MacOS Finder\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "…der copy bug on arm64 macOS devices.\n\n# What problem are we solving?\nThis pull request fixes #2445\n\n# How are we solving the problem?\nMoved noapplexattr under an if statement the switches on runtime.GOARCH == \"amd64\"\n\n# How is the PR tested?\nCompiled and tested on macOS Sonoma 14.11 (arm64)\n\n# Checks",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "weed server -dir=\"./data\" --filer=true\nweed mount -filer=localhost:8888 -dir=mnt/SeaweedFS -allowOthers -volumeServerAccess=direct -nonempty -replication=000 -filer.path=/",
+        "####################################################\n# Customizable filer server options\n####################################################\n[filer.options]\n    # with http DELETE, by default the filer would check whether a folder is empty.\n    # recursive_delete will delete all sub folders and files, similar to \"rm -Rf\"\n    recursive_delete = false\n\n    ####################################################\n    # The following are filer store options\n    ####################################################\n\n[leveldb2]\n    # local on disk, mostly for simple single-machine setup, fairly scalable\n    # faster than previous leveldb, recommended.\n    enabled = true\n    dir     = \"./filerldb2\" # directory to store level db files",
+        "I1120 12:32:16  2959 dir.go:78] dir Attr /test, attr: valid=1s ino=4988074164372377492 size=0 mode=drwxr-xr-x\nI1120 12:32:16  2959 file.go:51] file Attr /test/bjesuiterphotography-fernsehturm.jpg, open:0 existing:valid=1m0s ino=0 size=0 mode=----------\nI1120 12:32:16  2959 file.go:51] file Attr /test/myfile.md, open:0 existing:valid=1m0s ino=0 size=0 mode=----------"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
